title: Mothercare India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Mothercare India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Mothercare India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About Mothercare India:
Mothercare India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mothercare India!
